allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Users\\James\\Desktop\\Homepage\\Robot.jpg","C:\\Users\\James\\OneDrive\\Attachments\\Desktop\\Homepage\\Robot.jpg"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---search---"; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\Users\\James -Recurse -Include Robot.jpg,robot.jpg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3100/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $html = $r.Content; foreach \($needle in 'Enquiries left to go cold','< 60 sec','24/7','We follow up until they reply','Who is this for?'\) { Write-Output "$needle : $\($html.Contains\($needle\)\)" }; $ix1 = $html.IndexOf\('In seconds'\); $ix2 = $html.IndexOf\('Enquiries left to go cold'\); $ix3 = $html.IndexOf\('Who is this for?'\); Write-Output "order: timeline=$ix1 proofband=$ix2 trades=$ix3")
